name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M12382 Blue] This Romy card holder combines Louis Vuitton's iconic Monogram canvas with a colored leather lining. Its elegant and practical design features three card slots, a zippered coin pocket, and an extra slip pocket for tickets and receipts. The card holder easily fits into any pocket or handbag.
name_cn:
Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M12382 Blue] This Romy card holder combines Louis Vuitton's iconic Monogram canvas with a colored leather lining. Its elegant and practical design features three card slots, a zippered coin pocket, and an extra slip pocket for tickets and receipts. The card holder easily fits into any pocket or handbag.
12 x 8 x 0.8 cm (Length x Height x Width)
